Package com.audiodo.aspen

Class IVolumeCapability

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.audiodo.aspen.IObservableProperty
      • com.audiodo.aspen.IVolumeCapability
  • public class IVolumeCapability
extends IObservableProperty
    The volume capability

      Constructors 
      Modifier Constructor Description

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void delete()  
      void disableVolumeLimit()
      Disable volume limit

      An asynchronous request to disable volume limit.
      void enableVolumeLimit()

      An asynchronous request to enable volume limit.
      protected void finalize()  
      protected static long getCPtr​(IVolumeCapability obj)  
      short getMaximumVolumeLimit()
      Get the maximum volume limit for the audio device

      The volume limit has been measured according to the standard
      BS EN 50332-1.
      static java.lang.String getObservableEventDisableVolumeLimitConfirmation()
      Confirmation from device that the volume limit is disabled

      Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed a
      disable_volume_limit request.
      static java.lang.String getObservableEventEnableVolumeLimitConfirmation()
      Confirmation from device that the volume limit is enabled

      Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed an
      enable_volume_limit request.
      static java.lang.String getObservableEventGetVolumeLimitStatusConfirmation()
      Notification that the capability is in sync with device

      On session establish the volume capability will synchronize with the remote
      device.
      static java.lang.String getObservableEventSetVolumeLimitConfirmation()
      Confirmation from device that the volume limit was set

      Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed a
      set_volume_limit request.
      short getVolumeLimit()
      Get the volume limit
      boolean isVolumeLimitEnabled()
      Check if volume limit is enabled
      boolean remoteDeviceInSync()
      Check if the capability is in sync with the audio device.
      void setVolumeLimit​(short value)
      Set the volume limit

      If the volume limit is set higher than the maximum of the device,
      the request will go through and the volume limit will be set to the max.

      An asynchronous request to set the volume limit value.
      Observers will be notified with event get_observable_event_set_volume_limit_confirmation
      when the change has been confirmed by the remote device.
      protected void swigSetCMemOwn​(boolean own)

    • Method Detail

      • getCPtr

        protected static long getCPtr​(IVolumeCapability obj)

      • swigSetCMemOwn

        protected void swigSetCMemOwn​(boolean own)
        Overrides:
        swigSetCMemOwn in class IObservableProperty

      • finalize

        protected void finalize()
        Overrides:
        finalize in class IObservableProperty

      • delete

        public void delete()
        Overrides:
        delete in class IObservableProperty

      • setVolumeLimit

        public void setVolumeLimit​(short value)
        Set the volume limit

        If the volume limit is set higher than the maximum of the device,
        the request will go through and the volume limit will be set to the max.

        An asynchronous request to set the volume limit value.
        Observers will be notified with event get_observable_event_set_volume_limit_confirmation
        when the change has been confirmed by the remote device.

        Parameters:
        value - The volume limit in dBSPL as an uint8_t.

      • getVolumeLimit

        public short getVolumeLimit()
        Get the volume limit

        Returns:
        uint8_t Returns the currently set volume limit in dBSPL.

      • getMaximumVolumeLimit

        public short getMaximumVolumeLimit()
        Get the maximum volume limit for the audio device

        The volume limit has been measured according to the standard
        BS EN 50332-1.

        Returns:
        The maximum volume limit as an uint8_t.

      • enableVolumeLimit

        public void enableVolumeLimit()
        Enable volume limit

        An asynchronous request to enable volume limit. Observers will be
        notified with event get_observable_event_enable_volume_limit_confirmation when the change
        has been confirmed by the remote device.

      • disableVolumeLimit

        public void disableVolumeLimit()
        Disable volume limit

        An asynchronous request to disable volume limit. Observers will be
        notified with event get_observable_event_disable_volume_limit_confirmation when the change
        has been confirmed by the remote device.

      • isVolumeLimitEnabled

        public boolean isVolumeLimitEnabled()
        Check if volume limit is enabled

        Returns:
        bool Returns true if volume limit is active, false if not.

      • remoteDeviceInSync

        public boolean remoteDeviceInSync()
        Check if the capability is in sync with the audio device.

        Returns:
        True if it is in sync, false if not in sync.

      • getObservableEventGetVolumeLimitStatusConfirmation

        public static java.lang.String getObservableEventGetVolumeLimitStatusConfirmation()
        Notification that the capability is in sync with device

        On session establish the volume capability will synchronize with the remote
        device. On completion the observers will be notified with this event. The subject
        parameter is not used for this event.

        Returns:
        A string that identifies the event.

      • getObservableEventEnableVolumeLimitConfirmation

        public static java.lang.String getObservableEventEnableVolumeLimitConfirmation()
        Confirmation from device that the volume limit is enabled

        Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed an
        enable_volume_limit request. The subject parameter is not used for this event.

        Returns:
        A string that identifies the event.

      • getObservableEventDisableVolumeLimitConfirmation

        public static java.lang.String getObservableEventDisableVolumeLimitConfirmation()
        Confirmation from device that the volume limit is disabled

        Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed a
        disable_volume_limit request. The subject parameter is not used for this event.

        Returns:
        A string that identifies the event.

      • getObservableEventSetVolumeLimitConfirmation

        public static java.lang.String getObservableEventSetVolumeLimitConfirmation()
        Confirmation from device that the volume limit was set

        Observers will be notified with this event when the remote device has confirmed a
        set_volume_limit request. The subject parameter is not used for this event.

        Returns:
        A string that identifies the event.
